content:
Onyx just hit #1 on GitHub trending.

Open source AI platform — self-hostable, works with every major LLM provider, and ships with:

- Agentic RAG
- Deep research mode
- Custom agents
- Web search
- Code execution
- Voice mode
- Image generation
- 50+ connectors out of the box

This is what a self-hosted AI stack is starting to look like.
